Functions for managing and retrieving counts related to fake shared profile storage operations.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a set of functions related to a fake shared profile storage system. The functions provide mechanisms to reset and retrieve various operation counts associated with Bluetooth operations. Specifically, the functions include [`fake_shared_prf_storage_reset_counts`](<#fake_shared_prf_storage_reset_counts>) to reset all counts, and several getter functions to obtain counts for storing and deleting Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) and Bluetooth Classic profiles. These functions are likely used for testing or simulating the behavior of a Bluetooth profile storage system.
# Function Declarations (Public API)

---
### fake\_shared\_prf\_storage\_reset\_counts<!-- {{#callable_declaration:fake_shared_prf_storage_reset_counts}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../tests/fakes/fake_shared_prf_storage.h#L19>)

Reset all profile storage operation counts to zero.
- **Description**: Use this function to reset all internal counters related to profile storage operations to zero. This is useful when you need to clear the current count state, such as during testing or before starting a new operation cycle. Ensure that no other operations are dependent on the current count values before calling this function, as it will erase all existing count data.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: None
- **See Also**: [`fake_shared_prf_storage_reset_counts`](<fake_shared_prf_storage.c.md#fake_shared_prf_storage_reset_counts>)  (Implementation)

### fake\_shared\_prf\_storage\_get\_ble\_store\_count<!-- {{#callable_declaration:fake_shared_prf_storage_get_ble_store_count}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../tests/fakes/fake_shared_prf_storage.h#L20>)

Returns the count of BLE store operations.
- **Description**: Use this function to obtain the current count of Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) store operations. This function is useful for monitoring or debugging purposes to track how many times BLE store operations have occurred. Ensure that the system is in a state where accessing this count is valid, typically after initialization and during normal operation.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: Returns an integer representing the number of BLE store operations that have been performed.
- **See Also**: [`fake_shared_prf_storage_get_ble_store_count`](<fake_shared_prf_storage.c.md#fake_shared_prf_storage_get_ble_store_count>)  (Implementation)

### fake\_shared\_prf\_storage\_get\_ble\_delete\_count<!-- {{#callable_declaration:fake_shared_prf_storage_get_ble_delete_count}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../tests/fakes/fake_shared_prf_storage.h#L21>)

Returns the count of BLE delete operations.
- **Description**: Use this function to obtain the current count of Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) delete operations recorded in the shared profile storage. This function is useful for monitoring or debugging purposes to track how many BLE delete operations have occurred. Ensure that the shared profile storage system is initialized before calling this function to get meaningful data.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: Returns an integer representing the number of BLE delete operations.
- **See Also**: [`fake_shared_prf_storage_get_ble_delete_count`](<fake_shared_prf_storage.c.md#fake_shared_prf_storage_get_ble_delete_count>)  (Implementation)

### fake\_shared\_prf\_storage\_get\_bt\_classic\_store\_count<!-- {{#callable_declaration:fake_shared_prf_storage_get_bt_classic_store_count}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../tests/fakes/fake_shared_prf_storage.h#L22>)

Returns the count of stored Bluetooth Classic profiles.
- **Description**: Use this function to obtain the current number of Bluetooth Classic profiles stored in the shared profile storage. This function is useful for monitoring or debugging purposes to understand how many profiles are currently stored. It does not modify any data and can be called at any time without preconditions.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: Returns an integer representing the number of stored Bluetooth Classic profiles.
- **See Also**: [`fake_shared_prf_storage_get_bt_classic_store_count`](<fake_shared_prf_storage.c.md#fake_shared_prf_storage_get_bt_classic_store_count>)  (Implementation)

### fake\_shared\_prf\_storage\_get\_bt\_classic\_platform\_bits\_count<!-- {{#callable_declaration:fake_shared_prf_storage_get_bt_classic_platform_bits_count}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../tests/fakes/fake_shared_prf_storage.h#L23>)

Returns the count of Bluetooth Classic platform bits.
- **Description**: Use this function to obtain the current count of Bluetooth Classic platform bits stored in the shared profile storage. This function is useful when you need to monitor or verify the number of platform bits related to Bluetooth Classic. Ensure that the shared profile storage is initialized before calling this function to avoid undefined behavior.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: Returns an integer representing the count of Bluetooth Classic platform bits.
- **See Also**: [`fake_shared_prf_storage_get_bt_classic_platform_bits_count`](<fake_shared_prf_storage.c.md#fake_shared_prf_storage_get_bt_classic_platform_bits_count>)  (Implementation)

### fake\_shared\_prf\_storage\_get\_bt\_classic\_delete\_count<!-- {{#callable_declaration:fake_shared_prf_storage_get_bt_classic_delete_count}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../tests/fakes/fake_shared_prf_storage.h#L24>)

Returns the count of Bluetooth Classic delete operations.
- **Description**: Use this function to obtain the current count of delete operations performed on Bluetooth Classic profiles. This function is useful for monitoring or logging purposes where tracking the number of deletions is necessary. It does not modify any state and can be called at any time to retrieve the current count.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: Returns an integer representing the number of Bluetooth Classic delete operations.
- **See Also**: [`fake_shared_prf_storage_get_bt_classic_delete_count`](<fake_shared_prf_storage.c.md#fake_shared_prf_storage_get_bt_classic_delete_count>)  (Implementation)
